snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.service.getresource(
    resource_id="ResourceID",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.service.getresource(
        resource_id="ResourceID",
    )


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.sync_client:
import datetime

from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.service.listresources(
    page_limit=1,
    before_date=datetime.date.fromisoformat(
        "2023-01-15",
    ),
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio
import datetime

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.service.listresources(
        page_limit=1,
        before_date=datetime.date.fromisoformat(
            "2023-01-15",
        ),
    )


asyncio.run(main())
